query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, urc.role, urc.cities, c.name as city_name
FROM users u
JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId
LEFT JOIN cities c ON JSON_CONTAINS(urc.cities, CAST(c.id AS JSON))
WHERE u.name = '小凡' AND urc.role = 'teacher'
LIMIT 5;
